term: 这头巾跟你的年龄不相称。Zhè tóujīn gēn nǐ de niánlíng bù xiāngchèn.
description: This kerchief doesn't suit a person of your age.

term: 你这种工作作风与党员的称号很不相称。 Nǐ zhèzhǒng gōngzuò zuòfēng yǔ dǎngyuán de chēnghào hěn bù xiāngchèn.
description: Your work style is not worthy of a Party member. See xiāngchēng

term: 他的诗朴素而感情真挚。Tā de shī pǔsù ér gǎnqíng zhēnzhì.
description: His poems are simple in style and imbued with true feelings.

term: 片面宣布 piànmiàn xuānbù
description: declare unilaterally

term: 片面撕毁协议 piànmiàn sīhuǐ xiéyì
description: unilaterally tear up an agreement

term: 片面地看问题 piànmiàn de kàn wèntí
description: take a one-sided approach to problems

term: 片面强调 piànmiàn qiángdiào
description: put undue emphasis on

term: 世界先进水平 gǎnchāo shìjiè xiānjìn shuǐpíng
description: surpass the world's most advanced level

term: 在此关键时刻zài cǐ guānjiàn shíkè
description: at this crucial hour

term: 处于重要的历史时刻 chǔyú zhòngyào de lìshǐ shíkè
description: at a critical historical juncture

term: 恢复邦交 huīfù bāngjiāo
description: resume diplomatic relations

term: 恢复行使主权 huīfù xíngshǐ zhǔquán
description: resume the exercise of sovereignty (over a place)

term: 他的身体恢复了没有？ Tā de shēntǐ huīfù le méiyǒu？
description: Is he fully recovered?

term: 恢复民族权利 huīfù mínzú quánlì
description: restoration of national rights

term: 把竹帘子卷起来 bǎ zhú liánzi juǎn qǐ lái
description: roll up the bamboo screen

term: 卷起袖子就干 juǎn qǐ xiùzi jiù gàn
description: roll up one's sleeves and pitch in

term: 一个大浪把小船卷走了。Yī ge dà làng bǎ xiǎo chuán juǎn zǒu le.
description: A huge wave swept the boat away.

term: 熟练地操纵机器 shúliàn de cāozòng jīqì
description: skilfully operate the machine

term: 一种切实可行的经济体制正在形成。Yī zhǒng qièshíkěxíng de jīngjì tǐzhì zhèngzài xíngchéng.
description: A viable economy is shaping up.

term: 近代自然科学是从有了实验科学之后才形成的。Jìndài zìrán kēxué shì cóng yǒu le shíyàn kēxué zhīhòu cái xíngchéng de.
description: Modern natural science came into being only after the emergence of experimental science.

term: 这个艺术团已经形成了独特的风格。 Zhège yìshù tuán yǐjing xíngchéng le dútè de fēnggé.
description: This performing arts troupe has evolved a style of its own.

term: 充分发挥群众的积极性 Chōngfèn fāhuī qúnzhòng de jījíxìng
description: bring the initiative of the masses into full play

term: 发挥想像力 fāhuī xiǎngxiànglì
description: give free rein to one's imagination

term: 我们没有充分∼他的才干。Wǒmen méiyǒu chōngfèn fāhuī tā de cáigàn.
description: We're not doing justice to his talents.

term: 这一论点有待进一步发挥。Zhè yī lùndiǎn yǒudài jìnyībù fāhuī.
description: This point needs further elaboration.

term: 采购建筑材料 cǎigòu jiànzhù cáiliào
description: purchase building materials

term: 片批 piàn pī
description: slicing

term: 真理是批不倒的。Zhēnlǐ shì pī bù dǎo de.
description: Truth cannot be overthrown by criticism.

term: 批购 pī gòu
description: buy goods wholesale

term: 一大批积极分子 yī dà pī jījí fènzǐ
description: large numbers of activists

term: 这里落了两个字。 Zhèlǐ là le liǎng ge zì.
description: Two words are missing here.

term: 我忙着出来, 把书落在家里了。 Wǒ mángzhe chūlai, bǎ shū là zài jiālǐ le.
description: I was in a hurry and left my book at home.

term: 落下很远 là xià hěn yuǎn
description: fall (or be left) far behind

term: 谁也不愿意落在后面。 Shuí yě bù yuànyi là zài hòumian.
description: No one likes to lag behind.

term: 他落了一个星期的课。 Tā là le yī ge xīngqī de kè.
description: He's a whole week behind with his lessons. or He missed a week's lessons.

term: 受到这样的屈辱, 他情绪激动, 气得发抖。 Shòudào zhèyàng de qūrǔ, tā qíngxù jīdòng, qì de fādǒu.
description: Being slandered that way made his blood boil, and he shook with anger.

term: 他获得冠军, 激动得流下眼泪。 Tā huòdé guànjūn, jīdòng de liúxià yǎnlèi.
description: When he won the championship, he was moved to tears.

term: 这顿饭是他掏的钱。 Zhè dùn fàn shì tā tāo de qián.
description: He footed the bill for the meal.

term: 在墙上掏一个洞 Zài qiáng shàng tāo yī ge dòng
description: make a hole in the wall

term: 他的皮夹子被掏了。 Tā de píjiāzi bèi tāo le.
description: His wallet was stolen (by a pickpocket).

term: 他常用这种方式启发我们思考问题。 Tā cháng yòng zhèzhǒng fāngshì qǐfā wǒmen sīkǎo wèntí.
description: He often inspires us to ponder over questions this way.

term: 我从他的工作方法中得到启发。 Wǒ cóng tā de gōngzuò fāngfǎ zhōng dédào qǐfā.
description: I derived inspiration from his working method.

term: 老科学家的报告给了我们很多启发。 Lǎo kēxuéjiā de bàogào gěi le wǒmen hěn duō qǐfā.
description: The old scientist's lecture greatly inspired us.

term: 有些问题还需要弄清楚。Yǒuxiē wèntí hái xūyào nòng qīngchu.
description: Certain questions have yet to be clarified.

term: 有人对他是否胜任这项工作提出疑问。Yǒurén duì tā shì-fǒu shèngrèn zhè xiàng gōngzuò tíchū yíwèn.
description: Some people question his ability to do the job.

term: 今天没空, 改日再谈吧。 Jīntiān méi kòng, gǎirì zài tán ba.
description: I'm busy today. Let's talk about it some other day.

term: 我们已经劝说过他, 叫他放弃原来的计划。 Wǒmen yǐjing quànshuō guò tā, jiào tā fàngqì yuánlái de jìhuà.
description: We've talked him out of his original plan.

term: 他听从了我的劝说。 Tā tīngcóng le wǒ de quànshuō.
description: He gave in to my persuasion.

term: 当前的国际形势 dāngqián de guójì xíngshì
description: the current (or present) international situation

term: 符合当前政策 fúhé dāngqián zhèngcè
description: be in line with the current policy

term: 胜任工作 shèngrèn gōngzuò
description: be competent at a job; prove equal to the task

term: 这盒子怕压。Zhè hézi pà yā.
description: This box won't stand much weight.

term: 那个问题可难了, 我差点儿没答上来。 Nà ge wèntí kě nán le, wǒ chàdiǎnr méi dá shànglai.
description: The question was so difficult I almost failed to answer it.

term: 你差点儿(没)触电。Nǐ chàdiǎnr (méi) chùdiàn.
description: You narrowly escaped getting a shock.

term: 走这条路可上当了, 尽是水坑。 Zǒu zhè tiáo lù kě shàngdàng le, jìn shì shuǐkēng.
description: We're fools to have chosen this path; it's full of puddles.

term: 这家铺子卖这些东西给我时敲了我一下子。Zhè jiā pùzi mài zhèxiē dōngxi gěi wǒ shí qiāo le wǒ yīxiàzi.
description: The store overcharged me for the goods.

term: 相处得很好 xiāngchǔ de hěn hǎo
description: get on well with each other

term: 我们相处时间不长, 但已经结下了深厚的友谊。 Wǒmen xiāngchǔ shíjiān bù cháng, dàn yǐjing jiéxià le shēnhòu de yǒuyì.
description: We've not been together long, but we've become close friends.

term: 费了很大的口舌才把他说服。 Fèi le hěn dà de kǒushé cái bǎ tā shuōfú.
description: It took a lot of talking to convince him.

term: 不必费口舌了。 Bùbì fèi kǒushé le.
description: You might as well save your breath.

term: 主犯和从犯 zhǔfàn hé cóngfàn
description: principal and accessories in a crime

term: 把门推开 bǎ mén tuī kāi
description: push (or shove) the door open

term: 不要把重担子推给人家。 Bùyào bǎ zhòng dànzi tuī gěi rénjia.
description: Don't shift burdensome tasks onto others.

term: 这项工作得抓紧, 不能老是往后推。 Zhè xiàng gōngzuò de zhuājǐn, bù néng lǎoshi wǎng hòu tuī.
description: We have to get on with this job, we can't put it off day after day.

term: 往后推几天 Wǎng hòu tuī jǐ tiān
description: postpone for a few days

term: 你们说的是一码事。 Nǐmen shuō de shì yī mǎ shì.
description: You were talking about the same thing.

term: 他话里有骨头。Tā huà lǐ yǒu gǔtou.
description: His words had a bite to them.

term: 捎个口信 shāo ge kǒuxìn
description: take a message to sb.

term: 替我给大家捎个好。 Tì wǒgěi dàjiā shāo ge hǎo.
description: Please give my regards to everybody.

term: 没关系, 就磨破了一点皮。 Méi guānxi, jiù mó pò le yīdiǎn pí.
description: Nothing serious. Just a graze.

term: 袜子磨破了。Wàzi mó pò le.
description: The socks are worn into holes.

term: 鞋跟磨平了。 Xiégēn mó píng le.
description: The heels of the shoes are worn down.

term: 我劝了他半天, 嘴皮都快磨破了。Wǒ quàn le tā bàntiān, zuǐ pí dōu kuài mó pò le.
description: I talked till my jaws ached, trying to bring him around.

term: 磨剪子mó jiǎnzi
description: grind scissors; sharpen scissors

term: 他被这场病磨得不成样子。 Tā bèi zhè cháng bìng mó de bù chéng yàngzi.
description: The illness has worn him down to a mere shadow of his former self.

term: 这孩子可真磨人。Zhè háizi kě zhēn mó rén.
description: What a little torment that child is.

term: 他不答应, 你就跟他磨。Tā bù dāying, nǐ jiù gēn tā mó.
description: If he doesn't agree, just keep on at him until he does.

term: 快走吧, 别再磨时间了。Kuài zǒu ba, bié zài mó shíjiān le.
description: Stop dawdling and get going.

term: 补充两点意见 bǔchōng liǎng diǎn yìjian
description: have two points to add

term: 鼓着嘴 gǔ zhe zuǐ
description: pout

term: 鼓起勇气 gǔ qǐ yǒngqì
description: pluck up (or muster) one's courage

term: 你一定是搞误会了。 Nǐ yīdìng shì gǎo wùhuì le.
description: You must have misunderstood. or You must be mistaken.
